svg.title: Moltex complete rebuild pipeline
svg.desc: A vertical pipeline from a WordPress evidence export through safe intake, contract compilation, source capture, Astro generation, build verification, bounded Codex reconstruction, independent verification, and a completed Astro website.
svg.text: Moltex complete WordPress → Astro rebuild
Primary site pipeline runs from top to bottom
WordPress export

text.tspan: moltex_exporter performs one bounded export operation.
The result is treated as untrusted evidence, not executable input.

svg.text: A0 — Versioned moltex-export/1 evidence ZIP
H1 — Safe intake

text.tspan: • Enforce archive size, count, ratio, expansion, and path limits.
• Reject traversal, unsafe names, symlinks, duplicates, and collisions.
• Select the export-version adapter.
• Validate schemas, checksums, privacy, completeness, and readiness.
• Parse typed source facts with artifact and JSON-pointer lineage.

svg.text: A1 — RawSourceEvidence plus deterministic intake report
H2 — Canonical contracts

text.tspan: • Normalize identity, URLs, slugs, relationships, menus, and media.
• Compile content, route, asset, SEO, redirect, and capability contracts.
• Create stable IDs and immutable URL/media maps.
• Preserve ambiguity as findings or explicit operator decisions.
• Attach evidence lineage and derivation rules.
• Verify schemas, references, uniqueness, parity, and exact coverage.

svg.text: Gate — Every public subject is accounted for
A2 — Verified canonical contract set
Automated source capture

text.tspan: • Probe every public route: available, confirmed omitted, or blocker.
• Capture planned available routes at exact desktop/mobile viewports.
• Bind PNGs to bundle, plan, route, viewport, URL, size, and checksum.
• Require exact route-availability and visual-evidence coverage.

svg.text: A3 — Availability receipt and checksummed source visuals
H3 — Generate the Astro baseline

text.tspan: • Reverify contracts and visual evidence; safely extract required artifacts.
• Propagate confirmed omissions through routes, content, nav, SEO, and assets.
• Materialize bundled or deferred media under local public/media paths.
• Sanitize HTML, remove payloads, convert shortcodes, and rewrite URLs.
• Generate content, pages, listings, navigation, metadata, redirects, and 404.
• Generate an accessible conservative shell.
• Copy protected contracts/evidence and ship receipts plus Node verifier.

svg.text: A4 — Structurally complete conservative Astro workspace
Locked build and baseline proof

text.tspan: • Require Node 24.14.0 and npm 10.9.2 exactly.
• Run npm ci from the committed lockfile, then build static dist/.
• Verify routes, 404, content markers, local assets, and checksums.
• Reject executable source payloads and production media hotlinks.

svg.text: Gate — Locked production build and baseline verifier pass
H4 — Compile the Codex task graph

text.tspan: • Derive foundation, shell, route, visual, capability, production, and final tasks.
• Bound route groups to five routes and tasks to 30–60 minutes.
• Attach dependencies, minimal evidence, allowed paths, and protected paths.
• Attach acceptance checks, commands, and required completion evidence.
• Generate task briefs, ExecPlan, QA plan, instructions, and parity matrix.
• Verify DAG identity, scope, evidence, artifacts, and exact contract coverage.

svg.text: A5 — Published, buildable Astro/Codex workspace
Bounded Codex reconstruction loop

text.tspan: • Select the next task whose dependencies have completion evidence.
• Read its task brief, contracts, receipts, decisions, and source visuals.
• Edit only allowed Astro files; protected authority remains unchanged.
• Run every declared build and verification command.
• Record diff, session, changed files, commands, reports, and checksums.
• Validate evidence and repeat until every task is complete.

svg.text: A6 — Reconstructed source plus task execution evidence
H5 — Independent final verification

text.tspan: • Baseline: contracts, build inventory, routes, content markers, and assets.
• Migration: links, navigation, SEO, redirects, capabilities, preview, and HTTP.
• Parity: task evidence, browser console, accessibility, screenshots, and review.
• Emit localized results with check, subject, contract, evidence, and artifacts.

svg.text: Gate — All blockers pass and no named review remains
Fail, review, or decision → return to the bounded reconstruction loop
Complete rebuilt Astro website

text.tspan: Git-managed Astro source becomes the editable source of truth.
Production dist/ contains every required route and local asset.
WordPress, Python, and an OpenAI API are not runtime dependencies.

svg.text: A7 — Complete, independently verified Astro repository and dist/
H6 assurance — clean, mutation, browser, reproducibility, and repair evals
Proves that H1–H5 detect and localize the defects they claim to catch.
